title: Task: Review the 10 newly inserted x-auto draft entries conceptually. Output: rank top 5 by strategic fit for Masayuki Otawara / Cursorvers brand, note any overlap or weak posts, and recommend which 3 should be advanced first. Use the known themes from the 10 inserted source-grounded drafts. Keep it...
summary_text: **Top 5 by Strategic Fit (Masayuki Otawara / Cursorvers)** 1. `20260402-xauto-01` 「そのAI、誰が診ていますか」 Core brand question; strongest Cursorvers identity signal. 2. `20260402-xauto-10` 「goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い」 Strong founder POV + management accountability framing. 3. `20260402-xauto-09` 「一次資料を突き合わせる力が、AI時代の実力になる」 Differentiates with GuideScope-style “speed + evidence” positioning. 4. `20260402-xauto-08` 「医療AIのガバナンスは、セキュリティ抜きで語れない」 Credibility boost via Health ISAC linkage; governance depth. 5. `20260402-xauto-07` 「相互運用性の次は、データ品質の時代だ」 Technical authority post; good for expert audience trust. **Overlap / Weak Spots** - Major overlap cluster: `01/02/03/04` all center on governance,責任,判断点,運用継続. Keep one anchor + one operational follow-up, not all in a row. - Weakest strategically: `20260402-xauto-05`（「AIに、臨床の魂を」） is brand-consistent but too abstract vs others with concrete evidence. - `20260402-xauto-02` is solid but most replaceable (conceptually close to `01` and `03`). **Advance First (3)** 1. `20260402-xauto-01` (brand anchor) 2. `20260402-xauto-10` (founder decision lens) 3. `20260402-xauto-09` (source-grounded product/intellectual moat) This gives a clean sequence: identity -> decision standard -> evidence discipline.
